__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Cloisters Cards,Ariadne's Thread,The Rose Garden,Hedwig Glass,Daguerreotype Camera
|rank=blue
|amount=5
|category=self
|description=Per Super Memetic Chest opened: Snail RUSH +8; 50/50 Super Memetic Chests opened
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Super Memetic Chest]]
